title: neea orosiana
intro: Neea orosiana, a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neea orosiana include reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Neea orosiana are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, and it is also used in the form of extracts and tinctures.
